title: Shell Basics
description: Work directly in the lab server from the integrated terminal—no SSH jump box. Create a completion marker and inspect your environment with basic commands.
tasks: Open the lab terminal (you start logged in as your session user)
Read the briefing in your home directory
Create the completion marker file described in the briefing
Run whoami and pwd to confirm your working directory

objectivesPublic.label: Read the mission briefing
objectivesPublic.text: Find and read the briefing file in your home directory, then record that you finished reading it.
objectivesPublic.hint: Start in your home directory — list files, then use a command that prints file contents. The briefing tells you how to mark it read under /tmp.

objectivesPublic.label: Create the completion marker
objectivesPublic.text: Create the empty marker file described in the briefing.
objectivesPublic.hint: The briefing names the path; you only need an empty file there (no editor required).
